theme: battery bids that no scenario can bankrupt
title: Storm-Proof Battery Bids — scenario-consensus commitment plan
strategies: trivial: commit nothing; collect terminal value of the initial charge in every scenario -> 0.1

greedy (the trap): expected-value threshold dispatch on the mean price curve, buy bottom-quantile / sell top-quantile at full power; ignores that each scenario voids different hours -> void + shortfall penalties crater the worst scenario (0.0 on 7 of 10 planted trap cases)

strong: treat uncommitted charge as the real product (optionality). Stage 1 commits only in scenario-consensus hours with SoC buffers so the plan executes identically in every scenario; stage 2 evaluates the TRUE min-over-scenarios profit and hedges it: shrink commitments the worst scenario voids, re-open exposure only where penalty-adjusted worst-case math pays
alternatives above the reference: scenario-waterfilling the binding scenario set, robust LP/SOCP relaxations with clipping recourse, local search on the true min-scenario objective
